commit_message:
FEATURE: Change AXI-VC components to allow multiple instantiations FEATURE: Change AXI-VC components to allow multiple instantiations Moved the queues and variables from the package directly to the AXI components. This allows for multiple VC components to be instantiated to verify multiple AXI-interfaces.

Closes #207
